tweets.text:
#Bitcoin / bitcoin:native 

Still confident we see one last leg lower before the bottom is in this bear market.

Optimistic path is hold off and continue to bounce a bit until mid to late August before moving lower, but also wouldn't be surprised if it happens sooner.

One way or another - I think we're close to the bottom from a time perspective and it's important to have some capital ready to deploy when it happens and continue to stack and position yourself in high conviction plays.

Don't expect to see $100K+ and new ATHs until 2027.
tweets.quoted_tweet_text: BREAKING: 45% chance Bitcoin hits $50,000 before $100,000 https://t.co/BfPAeWHwTQ
tweets.full_text:
#Bitcoin / bitcoin:native 

Still confident we see one last leg lower before the bottom is in this bear market.

Optimistic path is hold off and continue to bounce a bit until mid to late August before moving lower, but also wouldn't be surprised if it happens sooner.

One way or another - I think we're close to the bottom from a time perspective and it's important to have some capital ready to deploy when it happens and continue to stack and position yourself in high conviction plays.

Don't expect to see $100K+ and new ATHs until 2027.
